provenance.source: Hand-authored negative control: the model floats two candidate tools and asks the user to choose, committing to neither.

request_tools.name: get_exchange_rate
request_tools.description: Get the current exchange rate between two currencies.

raw_output: I could call convert_currency to give you the converted amount, or get_exchange_rate if you just want today's rate. Which would you like?
note: Both offered tools are named and the model commits to neither, asking the user to choose. Picking one would be a guess. no_tool is correct.
